message:
feat: add Ollama/Cursor/Windsurf/Aider agent types, parallel pane capture, and cross-platform process state

New agent types (config.go, agent_spec.go, create.go):
- ModelsConfig extended with DefaultOllama, Ollama, Cursor, Windsurf,
  and Aider alias maps alongside existing Claude/Codex/Gemini
- DefaultModels() includes llama3 and phi3 Ollama aliases
- GetModelName() dispatches to new alias maps for all 4 agent types
- ResolveModel() delegates to GetModelName() instead of inline switch
  (eliminates duplicated agent-type dispatch logic)
- ValidateModelAlias() covers all 7 agent types, normalizes alias to
  lowercase before lookup, sorts available aliases in error message
- agentTypeToString() maps all tmux.Agent* constants including
  AgentCursor, AgentWindsurf, AgentAider, AgentOllama, AgentUser

Parallel pane capture (robot.go):
- collectNormalizedTmuxProjection() now calls tmux.GetAllPanes() once
  to bulk-fetch all panes across all sessions in a single tmux call,
  instead of calling GetPanes() per-session
- Worker pool (capped at 10 goroutines) dispatches captureJob structs
  through a buffered channel, each worker calling the appropriate
  capture function (CaptureForStatusDetection or CaptureForFullContext
  based on whether a model name is associated)
- Results collected into allCapturedContent map before the per-session
  enrichment loop, so each pane is captured exactly once
- enrichAgentStatus() now receives pre-captured content as a parameter
  instead of calling tmux.CaptureForStatusDetection() internally,
  eliminating redundant captures

Cross-platform process state (liveness.go):
- GetProcessState() now tries /proc/<pid>/status first (Linux) and
  falls back to `ps -o state= -p <pid>` (macOS/Linux) when /proc
  is unavailable. This enables status detection on macOS where /proc
  doesn't exist.
- macOS-specific state codes (I=idle, U=uninterruptible) mapped to
  human-readable names
- ps output parsed to extract first character of multi-char state
  strings (e.g., S+ on macOS)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -545,10 +545,20 @@ func agentTypeToString(t tmux.AgentType) string {
 		return "codex"
 	case tmux.AgentGemini:
 		return "gemini"
+	case tmux.AgentCursor:
+		return "cursor"
+	case tmux.AgentWindsurf:
+		return "windsurf"
+	case tmux.AgentAider:
+		return "aider"
+	case tmux.AgentOllama:
+		return "ollama"
+	case tmux.AgentUser:
+		return "user"
 	default:
 		if s := string(t); s != "" {
 			return s
 		}
-		return "user"
+		return "unknown"
 	}
 }

@@ -303,20 +303,20 @@ func RestoreAgents(sessionName string, state *SessionState, cmds AgentCommands)
 
 // getAgentCommand returns the command for an agent type.
 func getAgentCommand(agentType string, cmds AgentCommands) string {
-	switch agentType {
-	case "cc", "claude":
+	switch tmux.AgentType(agentType) {
+	case tmux.AgentClaude:
 		return cmds.Claude
-	case "cod", "codex":
+	case tmux.AgentCodex:
 		return cmds.Codex
-	case "gmi", "gemini":
+	case tmux.AgentGemini:
 		return cmds.Gemini
-	case "cursor":
+	case tmux.AgentCursor:
 		return cmds.Cursor
-	case "windsurf":
+	case tmux.AgentWindsurf:
 		return cmds.Windsurf
-	case "aider":
+	case tmux.AgentAider:
 		return cmds.Aider
-	case "ollama":
+	case tmux.AgentOllama:
 		return cmds.Ollama
 	default:
 		return ""
